category_sources: source_facts.description says libquicktime is a library for reading and writing QuickTime files; official homepage describes reading and writing QuickTime, AVI, and MP4 files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libquicktime; official homepage title and project page use Libquicktime.
docs_sources: Official libquicktime SourceForge homepage is the project documentation surface; official site also exposes a /doc/ documentation area.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official SourceForge project page exposes a Git repository for libquicktime.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies reading and writing QuickTime files; official homepage adds AVI and MP4 support context.
